meaning: n.剪下的东西,剪辑adj.<俗>头等的,极好的,快速的
examples: I saw an old man out clipping his hedge.
At clipping time sheep need to be penned.
So, that was called coupon clipping.
But not everyone is confident that clipping costs will help the project sail through.
Years ago clipping coupons from bonds was the province and passion of people in retirement.
